4.2. Convergence analysis
The convergence characteristics are analyzed using posi-
tioning circular error probable (CEPs) (van Bree and
Tiberius, 2012). Daily observations of 14 stations from
DOY 274 to 287 in 2023 were divided into 43 groups of
3-hour subsets sliding forward in steps of 30 min from
00:00:00 to 21:00:00. Then, CE
